basic_details.job_title: CSIR TKDL Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Traditional Knowledge Digital Library Unit (CSIR TKDL)
basic_details.short_information: Traditional Knowledge Digital Library Unit (CSIR TKDL) has released the official Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 notification on the official website. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the CSIR TKDL Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a qualification of B.E./B.Tech, Master’s Degree, or MCA can apply online on or before 23 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be called for the walk-in interview scheduled on 27 July 2026 and 28 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years; OBC: 3 years as per CSIR/Govt. of India rules.

qualification.details: Project Associate-I (Material Science): B.E./B.Tech in Materials Engg./Materials Science & Engg./Mineral Engg./Chemical Engg. or Master’s Degree in Material Science/Chemistry or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Metallurgy): B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgy/Metallurgical Engg. or Master’s Degree in Chemistry or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Patent): B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgy/Metallurgical Engg./Materials Engg./Materials Science & Engg./Mineral Engg./Chemical Engg. or Master’s Degree in Material Science/Chemistry or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Agriculture): Master’s /Integrated Master’s Degree in Agriculture/Agronomy/Horticulture/Animal Science/any branch of Veterinary Sciences/Zoology from a recognized University or equivalent. Project Associate-I (IT): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology from a recognized University or equivalent or MCA from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: Project Associate-I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR TKDL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR TKDL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR TKDL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR TKDL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (Material Science): B.E./B.Tech in Materials Engg./Materials Science & Engg./Mineral Engg./Chemical Engg. or Master’s Degree in Material Science/Chemistry or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Metallurgy): B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgy/Metallurgical Engg. or Master’s Degree in Chemistry or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Patent): B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgy/Metallurgical Engg./Materials Engg./Materials Science & Engg./Mineral Engg./Chemical Engg. or Master’s Degree in Material Science/Chemistry or equivalent. Project Associate-I (Agriculture): Master’s /Integrated Master’s Degree in Agriculture/Agronomy/Horticulture/Animal Science/any branch of Veterinary Sciences/Zoology from a recognized University or equivalent. Project Associate-I (IT): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology from a recognized University or equivalent or MCA from a recognized University.

content_sections.heading: CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years; OBC: 3 years as per CSIR/Govt. of India rules.

content_sections.heading: CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA Per Month

rows.event: Last Date to Submit Online Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR TKDL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I posts is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Project Associate-I position across various specializations as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate-I (IT)?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate-I (IT) role, candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Information Technology or an MCA from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Associate-I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Project Associate-I positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate-I posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Project Associate-I posts be located?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for posts in New Delhi, Delhi, with the organization being the Traditional Knowledge Digital Library Unit (CSIR TKDL).

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate-I positions are on a contract basis, offering a fixed-term engagement within the CSIR TKDL organization.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the CSIR TKDL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of CSIR TKDL or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.
